goals: Search for existing memories about design collaboration preferences and patterns
Store new information about the graphic designer's workflow preferences and communication style
List all stored memories to review what has been learned about the collaboration
Delete outdated or incorrect memories that no longer reflect current working patterns

memories.text: Graphic designer prefers Figma for feedback sessions

user_agent_config.personality: Pragmatic and detail-oriented. Prefers efficient communication and values clear documentation of working preferences.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands document management systems and UI implementation workflows. Does not know internal tool names or memory system APIs - treats this as a natural conversation about remembering work preferences.

end_condition: The user has successfully searched for existing memories, added new relevant information about the design collaboration, reviewed all stored memories, and cleaned up any outdated information.
